channel.title: Sql on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Sql on Pi Stack

item.title: Firebird vs PostgreSQL vs MariaDB: Best Self-Hosted SQL Database 2026
item.description: Choosing the right self-hosted relational database is one of the most consequential infrastructure decisions you will make. The database sits at the center of every application, and picking the wrong one leads to painful migrations down the road.
